item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 4min 10th SGOTT today so not far off. Basically elite in every department but not at the same
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 4min 10th SGOTT today so not far off. Basically elite in every department but not at the same time. It’ll click for him one day soon I think. Cita Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 18 abr. Spieth doing the best Spieth pastiche you could imagine this week
2nd ATG in R1 1st PUTT in R2 1st APP in R3
Awful driving but wouldn’t shock me were he somehow 1st or 2nd OTT tomorrow 864

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 14min An unofficial list of songs to listen to while walking The Old Course on Su
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 14min An unofficial list of songs to listen to while walking The Old Course on Sunday when no golf is allowed:
10. Windfall, Son Volt 9. Vienna, Billy Joel 8. Drift Away, Doby Gray 7. A Little Bit Of Everything, Dawes 6. Spring into Summer, Lizzy McAlpine 5. Stay Dogs, Hrishikesh Mostrar más 5 1 22 3 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 15min #DISCUSSION — Which club in your golf bag goes 180 yards? 35 2 16 6 mil
